sources.name: Pickswise
sources.warning: Expected ≥1 picks but got 0 — parser may be broken

picks.analysis: KAT did not take a 3-pointer in the first three quarters on Monday, and removing that threat allowed Wembanyama to expend less energy defensively. No wonder he played his most efficient game of the NBA Finals thus far. The Knicks coaching staff has undoubtedly pointed out to Towns the compound effect that comes with his offensive reluctance. If they want to put the San Antonio Spurs on the brink, then KAT needs to make Wembanyama stress on defense and thus cut into his offense.
picks.key: SA @ NYK|Prop|victor wembanyama u27.5 points scored (-115)

consensus.key: SA @ NYK|Prop|victor wembanyama u27.5 points scored (-115)
